steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Count the relevant faces, dimensions, or scale factor before setting up equations. Lengths scale by $k$, areas by $k^2$, and volumes by $k^3$; for boxes and prisms, write the needed face or volume formula directly.

steps.title: Explanation
steps.content: Convert the area unit first. Since $1 \text{ m} = 3.28 \text{ ft}$, squaring both sides gives $1 \text{ m}^2 = (3.28)^2 \text{ ft}^2 = 10.7584 \text{ ft}^2$.

steps.title: Explanation
steps.content: Convert from per hour to per minute by dividing by 60: $$\frac{26.01}{60} \approx 0.433 \text{ m}^2/\text{min}$$
